# Base Memory

Gridlock guidance that has since been contradicted by newer guidance. Retained
here as the base for its `.derived` twin (`memories/base-memory.derived.md`),
which shares the `gridlock` tag and therefore stays inside the SAME FTS

what this pair actually pins.
